image_source.selection_reason: TTFHW skill requires openEuler 24.03 LTS as mandatory image

architecture.source: README.md - 支持的硬件环境章节

recommended_image.value: 文档推荐Docker镜像: swr.cn-south-1.myhuaweicloud.com/ascendhub/cann:8.5.0-910b-ubuntu22.04-py3.10 (Ubuntu 22.04 + CANN预装), 按skill要求使用openEuler 24.03 LTS

value: CANN ops组合包: Ascend-cann-910b-ops_8.5.0_linux-x86_64.run (运行态依赖)
dependencies.source: docs/quick_install.md - 前置依赖章节 + requirements.txt

sample_commands.value: 安装后执行: source ${ASCEND_INSTALL_PATH}/bin/setenv.bash && python3 ${ASCEND_INSTALL_PATH}/tools/ascend_system_advisor/asys/asys.py -h / python3 ${ASCEND_INSTALL_PATH}/tools/msaicerr/msaicerr.py -h
sample_commands.source: README.md - 功能运行示例章节

value.name: 闭源二进制包 (cann-oam-tools-release-x86_64.tar.gz)
value.install_method: 由install_bundle.sh自动下载解压到bundle目录

special_dependencies.source: docs/quick_install.md - 软件安装章节 + 依赖包清单 + install_bundle.sh

execution_log.command: dnf update -y && dnf install -y cmake gcc gcc-c++ make ccache git wget curl python3 python3-pip patch
pip3 install pytest coverage pytest-cov pytest-mock numpy pandas PyYAML requests psutil decorator protobuf setuptools ruff yapf h5py torch==2.12.0+cpu
execution_log.output: All Python packages installed successfully (torch via --extra-index-url)

execution_log.error: fatal: detected dubious ownership in repository at '/workspace/build/_deps/cann-cmake-src'

execution_log.command: git config --global --add safe.directory '*' && rm -rf build/ && bash build.sh -j12 (second attempt)
execution_log.output: Failed with CMake error: missing pkg_inc/mmpa

execution_log.command: mkdir -p /usr/local/Ascend/latest/pkg_inc && ln -sf /usr/local/Ascend/latest/x86_64-linux/include/mmpa /usr/local/Ascend/latest/pkg_inc/mmpa && rm -rf build/ && bash build.sh -j12
execution_log.output: Build succeeded. Generated cann-oam-tools_9.0.0_linux-x86_64.run (234MB) in build_out/
Tests completed with some ST failures

process_timeline.action: 验证过程启动 - 克隆仓库
安装系统依赖 (cmake, gcc, g++, make, python3等)
第一次构建尝试 - 失败(git dubious ownership)
第二次构建尝试 - 失败(缺少pkg_inc/mmpa)
第三次构建尝试 - 成功(创建pkg_inc软链接后)

install_st.detail: Install tests failed due to directory permission issues in container environment

upgrade_st.detail: Upgrade tests failed due to same permission issue as install

uninstall_st.detail: Uninstall tests had setup errors - pre-test install failed due to directory permission: '[oam_install] permission isn't right, it should belong to root'

results.name: asys
results.reason: Sample execution requires installed oam-tools .run package + NPU hardware + CANN ops package; container has no NPU device

results.name: msaicerr
results.reason: Sample execution requires NPU hardware (npu-smi) and CANN ops; container has no NPU device

results.name: msprof
results.reason: msprof analysis requires NPU hardware for data collection; container has no NPU device

documentation_gaps: Python版本要求(>=3.12.0)与openEuler 24.03 LTS默认Python版本(3.11.6)不匹配，文档未说明低版本Python的兼容性
pkg_inc/mmpa目录缺失问题未在README中提及，init_env.sh中有setup_cann_env函数创建软链接但未在主文档中说明
Docker部署章节推荐的镜像为Ubuntu 22.04，与openEuler 24.03的依赖安装方式(apt vs dnf)有差异但未说明
install_bundle.sh中闭源二进制包下载可能失败(网络问题)但文档未提供完整的手动下载和放置指引
ST测试中的install/upgrade/uninstall测试在非root权限或Docker环境中因目录权限问题会失败，文档未说明ST测试的前提条件

problems_encountered.problem: git dubious ownership error导致cmake FetchContent失败
problems_encountered.solution: 执行 git config --global --add safe.directory '*' 解决
problems_encountered.source: Docker容器中volume挂载导致文件ownership与容器用户不一致

problems_encountered.problem: CMake配置失败: mmpa_headers includes non-existent path /usr/local/Ascend/latest/pkg_inc/mmpa
problems_encountered.solution: 手动创建 /usr/local/Ascend/latest/pkg_inc/mmpa 软链接指向 x86_64-linux/include/mmpa
problems_encountered.source: CANN toolkit安装后pkg_inc目录未自动创建; init_env.sh的setup_cann_env函数会处理但build.sh未调用

problems_encountered.problem: Python 3.11.6 < 要求的3.12.0, openEuler 24.03 LTS无python3.12包
problems_encountered.solution: 使用Python 3.11.6继续, 未发现功能性问题

problems_encountered.problem: install/upgrade/uninstall ST测试因目录权限问题失败
problems_encountered.solution: 未解决 - 安装包要求install-path目录属于root用户, Docker容器中/workspace目录属主为uid 1000
problems_encountered.source: oam-tools .run安装包的权限检查逻辑

problems_encountered.problem: CANN toolkit下载约754MB, 耗时约11分钟
problems_encountered.solution: 等待下载完成, 正常网络延迟

problems_encountered.problem: 第一次pip install -r requirements.txt超时失败(torch包较大)
problems_encountered.solution: 分步安装Python包, torch单独使用--extra-index-url安装
problems_encountered.source: 网络问题 + torch CPU版本需要特殊索引URL
